result.markdown: --- title: "Calibrating an early-successional strategy" description: "Fitting a fast-growing, short-lived strategy and checking it against observed height trajectories." date: 2026-05-02 plant-version: "2.1.0" categories: [calibration, case-study] reading-time: true --- `plant 2.1.0`{=html} This post was built against the version badged above. If you're running a newer `plant`, the API may differ — the result here is frozen to what 2.1.0 produced. ## The strategy ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(plant) s <- strategy(FF16_Strategy( lma = 0.05, # cheap, short-lived leaves rho = 350, # low wood density — fast height gain hmat = 8 )) ``` ::: ## Reproducibility footer ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plant_session_info() ``` :::
